# Menzerna Super Finish Plus 3800 32oz

Super Finish Plus 3800 32oz - Show car finish for the ultimate deep gloss
Removes polishing marks, micro-scratches and holograms in a brilliant performance with genuine star qualities.

Benefits:

- Finest abrasives for removing fogging and holograms

- Show car finish

- 
***Silicone-free***
